name: Dương Xuân Thắng
description: Climate scientist studying ocean currents and climate change. Passionate about our planet’s future.

They are interested in reconstructing the historical flow of key currents and analyzing the grain sizes and isotope levels in sediment cores to gain insights into the current's strength and timing of changes in the AMOC.
